name: Auth0 Accounts Never Used After Provisioning
description: Detects active auth0 accounts older than 30 days with no successful login recorded.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.name AS account_name, u.created_at AS created_at FROM auth0_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.blocked, false) = false AND u.last_login IS NULL AND u.created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
remediation: Remove or disable unused accounts and confirm provisioning flows are not creating unnecessary access.
